Frame.Dialog:
You find yourself facing a [mirror]sparkling mirror[/color] - it gives you a choice between several mystical artifacts to aid you in your journey.
Which one will you choose?

The [mirror]sparkling mirror[/color] beckons, vibrating as it manifests your chosen artifact. It lands softly in your hands, prompting [mirror]the mirror[/color] and its surroundings to dissipate into thin air.

This will clear the permanent atlas, completed floor realizations, Red Mist challenge progress, Black Silence first-clear progress, and Distorted Ensemble first-clear progress.
Temporary pages in the current route will not be written back into the permanent atlas. Reset now?

RMR generates a chapter route with normal fights, elite fights, bosses, shops, rest sites, mystery events, abnormality battles, and floor realizations.
The atlas records core pages and combat pages you have permanently unlocked. Later routes, shops, and some special flows read from that atlas.
Floor realizations connect to the vanilla realization flow. After clearing one, that floor's exclusive abnormality pages and E.G.O. pages can enter the permanent reward pool.
Some special bosses have first-clear rewards. After clearing Black Silence once, reaching Urban Star in later routes automatically unlocks the Black Silence core page. After clearing Distorted Ensemble once, reaching Urban Star automatically unlocks the Distorted Blue Reverberation core page and combat pages.
Permanent atlas and realization progress have been reset.
